Container.Name: arr-unmonitor
Container.Overview:
Automatically unmonitors completed media in Radarr and Sonarr once they reach a target quality.
Supports multiple server instances (e.g. Radarr-4K, Radarr-1080p, Sonarr-Anime). Web UI with Dashboard, Settings, and Logs tabs.
IMPORTANT: The Radarr/Sonarr URL and API Key variables below only seed servers on FIRST LAUNCH with empty settings. After that, manage all servers via the Settings tab in the Web UI.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Persistent storage for settings, change log, and app log.

Config.Name: Radarr URL
Config.Description: Radarr base URL (e.g. http://radarr:7878). Only used to seed on first launch.

Config.Name: Radarr API Key
Config.Description: Radarr API key. Only used to seed on first launch.

Config.Name: Sonarr URL
Config.Description: Sonarr base URL (e.g. http://sonarr:8989). Only used to seed on first launch.

Config.Name: Sonarr API Key
Config.Description: Sonarr API key. Only used to seed on first launch.
